# service-identifier tokens forbidden as NEW additions in host tool files.
# One extended-regexp (ERE) per line; '#' comments and blank lines ignored.
# Each entry is wrapped by the scanner as a whole-token, case-insensitive match
# ( (^|[^[:alnum:]_])(<entry>)([^[:alnum:]_]|$) via grep -iE ), so a domain-style
# token supplies its own metachar escaping here (connev\.io), and a new token is
# a data edit only.
librechat
jeungpyeong
cbnu
portone
connev\.io
